name: unity
description: Connect Artyx to Unity for scene hierarchy edits, components, scripts, assets, play-mode checks, and verification loops.

interface.shortDescription: Drive the Unity Editor: scenes, GameObjects, scripts, play-mode.
interface.longDescription: Operate a live Unity Editor over MCP: build scene hierarchies, add components, author C# scripts, manage assets, and smoke-test in Play Mode. The bundled skill's guardrails stop a build from wiping its own scene.
defaultPrompt: Create a simple 2D game scene in Unity: a player sprite that moves with the arrow keys.

companion.title: Finish setup inside Unity
steps: Unity → Window → Package Manager → Add package from git URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp.git
Open the Unity MCP window and start the bridge.
Approve the auto-install of the Python server if prompted.
